title: ASR Outdoor 24pc Complete Gold Prospecting Backpack Kit with Folding Sluice Box
description:
ASR Outdoor Deluxe 24pc Gold Panning Kit w/ 50" Folding Sluice Box. Complete backpack prospecting set - everything you need to start finding gold anywhere. Includes durable rust-free aluminum sluice (50" extended, folds to 15") with pre-installed miner’s moss & carpet for high recovery, plus 30L canvas backpack for easy transport. No assembly required - deploy straight from your pack. Kit also features classifier screen, multiple dual riffle pans, finishing pan, folding pick/shovel, snifter bottles, vials, tweezers, pipettes, crevice picks & more. Ideal for beginners and experienced prospectors. Lightweight, portable, and built for high-yield recovery in the field.

Our Store Contact Us
ASR Outdoor 24pc Complete Gold Prospecting Backpack Kit with Folding Sluice Box
The ASR Outdoor Deluxe 24pc Gold Panning Kit w/ 50" Folding Sluice Box is a complete backpack prospecting set - everything you need to start finding gold anywhere. Includes a durable rust-free aluminum sluice (50" extended, folds to 15") with pre-installed miner’s moss & carpet for high recovery, plus a 30L canvas backpack for easy transport. No assembly required - deploy straight from your pack. Deluxe kit also features classifier screen, multiple dual riffle pans, finishing pan, folding pick/shovel, snifter bottles, vials, tweezers, pipettes, crevice picks & more. Ideal for beginners and experienced prospectors, it is lightweight, portable, and built for high-yield recovery in the field.
Key Features
  • BACKPACK GOLD PANNING KIT WITH SLUICE BOX: 24 total pieces; everything you need to strike it rich in one complete sluice box gold panning kit. Process your gold rich paydirt anywhere you can get on the gold
  • EFFORTLESS USE: Gold mining equipment ready to deploy from your backpack. No assembly required. When extended in a stream, the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place
  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: 50" folding suice box, canvas backpack, 1/2" bucket classifier screen, 10" and 12" dual riffle gold pans, 10" finishing gold pan, magnifying tweezers, folding shovel with pick, backpacker trail ribbon, (4) bedrock crevice picks, (2) carabiner clips for your gold pans; Fine gold recovery tools
  • CANVAS PROSPECTING BACKPACK: Lots of space in the top load central pouch, secured by drawstring and buckle snaps. Side pouches secure by zipper and hook-and-loop canvas flap. Total volume: 30L, Compartments: (2) side pouches, (1) front pouch, (1) top load
  • GOLD SLUICE BOX: Highly durable, constructed from rust-free aluminum. Includes miners moss and gold carpet pre installed. Extended Dimensions: Length: 50", Channel: 9.25", Side Wall: 2.5", Flange: 13.25", Folded Dimensions: 15" x 9.25" x 7"
Specifications
MPN: ASRO24
UPC: 810058482839
Type: Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit
Color: Desert Khaki
Number of Pieces: 24
Backpack Volume: 30L
Backpack Material: Canvas
Built for portability and performance, the ASR Outdoor Deluxe Gold Panning Kit is designed to make prospecting simple and efficient in the field. The 50" aluminum sluice box provides an extended run for improved material separation, while the pre-installed miner’s moss and gold carpet help trap fine gold and reduce loss. It folds compactly for transport and locks securely in place when in use, giving you stability in moving water.

The included 30L canvas backpack keeps all components organized and easy to carry into remote areas. A 1/2" bucket classifier screen helps quickly sort out larger rocks, allowing you to process finer, gold-bearing material more efficiently. The 10" and 12" dual riffle pans are ideal for primary panning, while the finishing pan is designed for more precise separation of fine gold.

For extraction, the folding pick/shovel and crevice picks allow you to break up compacted soil and reach into cracks where gold often settles. Magnifying tweezers provide control when handling small flakes, while snuffer bottles and pipettes make it easy to collect and transfer gold without losing material. Collection vials offer secure storage for your finds, and carabiners keep essential tools within reach.

This kit supports every stage of the prospecting process - from digging and classifying to recovery and storage - making it a dependable, all-in-one solution for gold hunting in a variety of environments.
